ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "rain_1h" REAL /* Rainfall in the past 1 hour in millimeters */,
  "rain_3h" REAL /* Rainfall in the past 3 hours in millimeters */,
  "snow_1h" REAL /* Snowfall in the past 1 hour in millimeters */,
  "snow_3h" REAL /* Snowfall in the past 3 hours in millimeters */,
  "cloud_coverage" INTEGER /* Cloud coverage in percentage */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Sunrise time */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Sunset time */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index in degrees Celsius */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Weather condition identifier */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Detailed weather description */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon code for weather condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
